records.Title: Technician performance note
records.Note: " Hi Michael. This is Sue Thomas at 6154 Arno Dr. A new tech, Eli began servicing our pool yesterday. I’m sorry to say this, but the pool was not cleaned thoroughly. Eli did spend time here, but a noticeable amount of debris was left on the bottom. He arrived after sunset so it was mostly dark, and he was on his phone much of the time. I don’t think the vacuum was used. I really dislike complaining, especially about someone new to the job. But I would appreciate your arranging a return visit today or tomorrow, to finish the job. If not possible, I’d appreciate a partial refund for cleaning it myself. Thank you.” / Is Willing to go out
records.Parse Notes: Continuation rows were joined to the previous dated comment.

notes: Private profile fields such as SSN, bank account/routing, passwords, addresses, and phone/email were intentionally excluded from import records.
Blank template rows were skipped. Rows with signer but no date are retained with blank Date and medium confidence.
The import page can map each Source Technician/Suggested Technician to a company user or skip that technician.
Import Enabled controls the default upload set. Training Schedule assignments are included for review but disabled by default because they are scheduled work, not completed performance notes.
